_publications._publicationTitle: Cyclic AMP suppression is sufficient to induce gliomagenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: In contrast, only 1 of 7 Tumor Progenitor mice and 1 of 6 wild-type mice had evidence of induced glioma. None of the 15 control injections of PDE4A1-H229Q resulted in a tumor.
details: Only 1 of 7 Tumor Progenitor mice developed induced glioma following PDE4A1 injection (not statistically significant)
